title: Tunisian Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired dish featuring chicken cooked in a rich and spicy tagine sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add tagine spice blend, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Sprinkle with romano cheese and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
